# Upgrade Plan

## Overview

Upgrade to the latest LTS versions: Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4. This includes updating the JDK, Spring Boot framework, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrating from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where required.

## Tasks

See tasks.json for the detailed task breakdown.

| ID | Description | Status |
|----|-------------|--------|
| 001-upgrade-java-spring-boot | Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4 | pending |
